data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: User data is encrypted using advanced algorithms to ensure privacy and security.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 encryption is applied to sensitive user data both in transit and at rest.

data.title: DDOS Mitigation
data.description: Robust systems are in place to mitigate Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Use of AWS Shield and custom traffic filtering mechanisms.

data.title: Access Controls
data.description: Strict access management policies to restrict unauthorized data access.
data.technical_spec: Role-based access control (RBAC) and Two-factor authentication (2FA) for administration.

data.title: Security Audits
data.description: Regular security audits and penetration testing to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Automated security tests integrated into CI/CD pipeline.

data.title: User Anomaly Detection
data.description: Systems in place to detect unusual user activities and respond accordingly.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning algorithms monitor user patterns to flag anomalies.
